headline: Europe’s rearmament push drives global military spending to record $2.9 trillion despite U.S. pullback
summary: Global military spending rose for an 11th straight year to a record $2.89 trillion in 2025, driven by Europe’s rearmament push, even as U.S. outlays declined.

raw.headline: Europe’s rearmament push drives global military spending to record $2.9 trillion despite U.S. pullback
